productDisplayName: Enamor Women Pink Mid-Rise Bikini Brief
description: Pink bikini briefs made of cotton / Lycra fabric, has an elastic waistband, mid rise styling and printed label on the inner Fit Mid rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron Tumble dry low This pair of bikini briefs from enamor is crafted using premium cotton fabric that provides quick dry breathability and no visible panty line. The cut allows free leg movement, the fashion elastic with cushioning enhances a luxurious feel and look, the no pinch elastic and printed label on the inside both provide irritation-free comfort. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of waist 26"
